name: La Estrella de Oro Pawn Shop
description_short: La Estrella de Oro No. 32 is a Miami-based pawn shop and licensed firearms dealer offering collateral-based loans and merchandise sales.
description_long:
La Estrella de Oro No. 32 operates as a pawn shop located at 2208 NW 28 Street in Miami, Florida. The business is part of the La Estrella de Oro chain, which operates multiple locations across the Miami area (at least two locations confirmed: No. 32 and No. 37). The company holds a valid Federal Firearms License (FFL Type 2), specifically licensed as a pawnbroker in firearms other than destructive devices, indicating regulatory compliance with federal firearms regulations.

The business offers traditional pawn shop services, accepting collateral-based loans against personal property. As a licensed firearms dealer, they may engage in the sale and transfer of firearms within the bounds of federal law and ATF regulations. The pawn shop model allows customers to secure short-term loans by pledging items of value, providing an alternative financial option for those seeking quick cash without credit checks.

La Estrella de Oro's presence as part of a multi-location chain suggests operational stability and established market presence in the Miami community. The business maintains contact information and an online directory listing, indicating basic digital accessibility for customers seeking their services. Their licensing under federal firearms regulations demonstrates adherence to compliance standards required in this industry.

Prospective customers should note that this listing appears on Arms Directory, a specialized platform for firearms-related businesses, and minimal additional business information is publicly available beyond the directory entry. The company has no reviews on the hosting platform, limiting third-party verification of service quality or customer experience. Customers considering pawn shop services should understand the typical cost structure of pawn loans, including interest rates and redemption periods, which vary by jurisdiction and individual agreements.
pros: Licensed Federal Firearms Dealer (FFL Type 2) with regulatory compliance documentation
Multi-location operation (at least 2 confirmed locations in Miami area) suggesting business stability
Direct phone contact available (305-381-5787) for customer inquiries
Established presence in Miami market as part of La Estrella de Oro chain
Traditional pawn shop model allows loans without credit checks or background verification
Physical storefront location accessible at 2208 NW 28 Street, Miami, FL
cons: No customer reviews available on listing platform, limiting transparency about service quality
Minimal publicly available information about loan terms, interest rates, or redemption policies
Limited digital presence with unclaimed business listing, suggesting low online engagement
Pawn loans typically carry high interest rates as standard industry practice
No website or additional online resources beyond directory listing for customer information
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash in exchange for personal collateral without credit evaluation
Individuals seeking short-term loans with flexible approval processes
People looking to buy or sell used firearms through a licensed, regulated dealer
diagnosis: La Estrella de Oro No. 32 is best suited for consumers in the Miami area who need immediate cash and have valuable personal property to pledge as collateral, or those seeking to purchase firearms through a licensed dealer. The main caveat is that pawn loans are short-term, high-cost financing options; borrowers should understand the interest rates and redemption terms before pledging valuable items, and minimal online information is available to evaluate specific terms or customer satisfaction.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans against personal property
Short-term lending secured by tangible assets
Federal firearms sales and transfers (FFL Type 2 licensed)
Pawnbroker services for firearms and other merchandise
Firearms compliance services within ATF regulations
Loan redemption and item recovery services
